release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 69. Restores a fixed first-time setup hotspot for Leah 2R Displays. The setup SSID is now 'leah 2R - 2.42I' and the fixed Wi-Fi password is 'leah00000000'. Both are shown clearly on the OLED whenever the setup portal opens. The setup portal remains available at 192.168.4.1. Retains Today and Yesterday insulin and carbohydrate history tables, COB/IOB Total OLED screen, customer-defined local alias, Nightscout SAGE and IOB/COB auto-read, sensor Auto and Manual modes, local buzzer controls, snooze reset, Wi-Fi profile handling and caregiver WhatsApp routing.
